Do not put companies in this field." }, "founded": { "label": "Founded", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The date the magazine company was founded.", "example": "{{start date|1998|3|13|df=y}}", "suggested": true }, "firstdate": { "label": "First issue", "type": "string", "required": true, "description": "The date of publication of the first issue of the magazine.", "example": "{{start date|1998|3|13|df=y}}" }, "finalnumber": { "label": "Final issue number", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The edition number of the final issue.", "example": "Vol 77 No 88" }, "finaldate": { "label": "Final issue", "type": "string", "required": false, "aliases": [ "lastdate" ], "description": "The date of the final issue of the magazine.", "example": "31 April 1999" }, "company": { "label": "Company", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The company that publishes the magazine.", "suggested": true }, "country": { "label": "Country", "type": "string", "required": true, "description": "Country of origin.", "example": "United Kingdom" }, "based": { "label": "Based in", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The town/city that the magazine is based in.", "example": "[[:en:New York City|New York City]], [[:en:New York|New York]], [[:en:United States|United States]]", "suggested": true }, "language": { "label": "Language", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The language the magazine is printed in.", "example": "English", "suggested": true }, "website": { "label": "Website", "type": "url", "required": false, "description": "The official website of the magazine." }, "issn": { "label": "ISSN", "type": "string", "required": false, "aliases": [ "ISSN" ], "description": "The International Standard Serial Number of the magazine. If the magazine has both a print and electronic version with separate ISSNs, use parameters \"ISSN\" and \"eISSN\"." }, "eissn": { "label": "eISSN", "type": "string", "required": false, "aliases": [ "eISSN" ] }, "oclc": { "label": "OCLC", "type": "string", "required": false, "aliases": [ "OCLC" ], "description": "The OCLC number of the magazine (automatically linked to http://WorldCat.org)." } }, "paramOrder": [ "italic title", "title", "logo", "logo_size", "image_file", "image_size", "image_alt", "image_page", "image_caption", "editor", "editor_title", "editor2", "editor_title2", "editor3", "editor_title3", "editor4", "editor_title4", "editor5", "editor_title5", "editor6", "editor_title6", "previous_editor", "staff_writer", "photographer", "category", "frequency", "format", "circulation", "publisher", "founder", "founded", "firstdate", "finaldate", "finalnumber", "company", "country", "based", "language", "website", "issn", "eissn", "oclc", "paid_circulation", "unpaid_circulation", "circulation_year", "total_circulation" ], "format": "block" } == Microformat == {{UF-hprod}} == Tracking category == * {{clc|Pages using infobox magazine with unsupported parameters}} == See also == * {{tl|Infobox journal}} * {{TL|Infobox newspaper}} {{Organization infoboxes}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Magazine templates]] [[Category:Organization infobox templates|Magazine]] [[Category:Publishing infobox templates|Magazine]] [[Category:s that add a tracking category]] [[Category:WikiProject Journalism templates]] [[Category:WikiProject Magazines templates]] }}

revision.comment: High-use template
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Auto italic title}} {{Lua|Module:Infobox|Module:InfoboxImage|Module:Check for unknown parameters}} == Usage == {{Parameter names example | italic title | title | logo | logo_size | image_size | image_file | image_alt | image_page | image_caption | editor_title | editor | editor_title2 | editor2 | editor_title3 | editor3 | editor_title4 | editor4 | editor_title5 | editor5 | editor_title6 | editor6 | previous_editor | staff_writer | photographer | category | frequency | format | circulation | publisher | paid_circulation | unpaid_circulation | circulation_year | total_circulation | founder | founded | firstdate | finalnumber | finaldate | company | country | based | language | website | issn | eissn | oclc | module}} To use this template please add the following code to the top of the article. ''Note: If you have no information for a certain parameter please just blank it rather than removing it so that other editors can see that it needs adding at a later stage'' {{Infobox magazine | title = | logo = | logo_size = | image_file = | image_size = | image_alt = | image_caption = | native_name = | editor = | editor_title = | previous_editor = | staff_writer = | photographer = | category = | frequency = | format = | circulation = | publisher = | paid_circulation = | unpaid_circulation = | circulation_year = | total_circulation = | founder = | founded = | firstdate = | finaldate = | finalnumber = | company = | country = | based = | language = | website = | issn = | eissn = | oclc = | module = }} {{clear}} If the magazine is defunct, include the '''finaldate''' and '''finalnumber''' parameters. If the magazine is still publishing, then these parameters should be omitted entirely: | finaldate = | finalnumber = If a breakdown into paid, unpaid and total circulation figures is desired, use the following lines instead of the '''circulation''' parameter: | paid_circulation = | unpaid_circulation = | circulation_year = | total_circulation = The '''company''' parameter should list the publishing company. The '''publisher''' parameter should be the named person who publishes the magazine. The '''previous_editor''' parameter should include earlier, notable, editors. In particular, the ''founding'' editor (if different from current editor), to a reasonable maximum number. If '''image_file''' is a .djvu and a particular page is desired, then use the '''image_page''' parameter: | image_page = If other editing positions are required (e.g. Senior Editor or Associate Editor), use the additional editor fields show below. | editor2 = | editor_title2 = | editor3 = | editor_title3 = | editor4 = | editor_title4 = | editor5 = | editor_title5 = | editor6 = | editor_title6 = === Parameter explanations and examples === A list of each field, what it is for and an example entry. Required parameters are asterisked (*). {| class="wikitable" ! Parameter ! Explanation ! Example |- ! title* | The name of the magazine. | style="text-align:center;" |The Wikipedian |- | '''logo''' | A logo relevant to the magazine. | style="text-align:center;" |Logo.png |- | '''logo_size''' | The size of the logo. | style="text-align:center;" | 200px
(Will default to 180px if no size is stated) |- | '''image_file''' | An image relevant to the magazine. ''(Usually the cover)''. | style="text-align:center;" |Image.png |- | '''image_size''' | The size of the image. | style="text-align:center;" | 200px
(Will default to 180px if no size is stated) |- | '''image_alt''' | A description of the image's visual appearance, suitable for someone who cannot see the image. See [[WP:ALT]]. | style="text-align:center;" |Mostly-assembled globe of puzzle pieces, each with a letter in a different script. The caption says "WikipediA: The Free Encyclopedia". |- | '''image_page''' | The desired page (for .djvu files). | style="text-align:center;" |7 |- | '''image_caption''' | A description of the image. | style="text-align:center;" |''The Wikipedian'' Issue 169, cover dated 31 November 1909 |- | '''native_name''' | The name of the magazine in its native language and script | style="text-align:center;" | |- | '''editor''' | The name of the editor of the magazine. (Must be used in conjunction with '''editor_title''' field) | style="text-align:center;" |[[John Smith]] |- | '''editor_title''' | The editor's job title. Editor, Editor-in-Chief etc. | style="text-align:center;" |Editor |- | '''editor2''' | The name of second editor. | |- | '''editor_title2''' | The second editor's job title. | |- | '''editor3''' | The name of third editor. | |- | '''editor_title3''' | The third editor's job title. | |- | '''previous_editor''' | Notable preceding Editors. ''(See Long Lists section below)'' | style="text-align:center;" |[[Jim Smith]] |- | '''staff_writer''' | Staff Writer(s). (Please break multiple lines with
)
''(See Long Lists section below)'' | style="text-align:center;" |[[Alan Smithee]]
[[Jane Smithee]] |- | '''photographer''' | Photographer(s). (Please break multiple lines with
)
''(See Long Lists section below)'' | style="text-align:center;" |[[Annie Smithee]]
[[Judy Smithee]] |- ! category* | The subject group of the magazine, e.g., Sport, Nature, History. Use as many as necessary. | style="text-align:center;" |Science, Sport, History |- ! frequency* | Monthly, weekly, daily, etc. | style="text-align:center;" |Monthly |- ! format* | paper size | style="text-align:center;" |A4 |- | '''circulation''' | Circulation figures.
''(If circulation breakdown required/available, leave this field blank and see fields lower down this table)''. | style="text-align:center;" |50,000 |- | '''publisher''' | The '''person''' that publishes the magazine. (''Do not put companies in this field. Use the company field below.'') | style="text-align:center;" |[[John Smith]] |- | '''founder''' | The '''person''' that founded the magazine. (''Do not put companies in this field. Use the company field below.'') | style="text-align:center;" |[[John Smith]] |- | '''founded''' | The date the magazine company was founded. Do not use both firstdate and founded if they are equivalent. | style="text-align:center;" |{{start date|1998|3|13|df=y}} |- ! firstdate* | The date of publication of the first issue of the magazine. Do not use both firstdate and founded if they are equivalent. | style="text-align:center;" |{{start date|1998|3|13|df=y}} |- | '''finaldate''' | The date of the final issue of the magazine.
''(Only use if the magazine has ceased publication)'' | style="text-align:center;" |31 April 1999 |- | '''finalnumber''' | The edition number of the final issue.
''(Only use if the magazine has ceased publication)'' | style="text-align:center;" |Vol 77 No 88 |- | '''company''' | The '''company''' that publishes the magazine. | style="text-align:center;" |[[The magazine publishing company]] |- ! country* | Country of origin. e.g. United Kingdom | style="text-align:center;" |United Kingdom |- | '''based''' | The town/city that the magazine is based in. | style="text-align:center;" |[[Wiki Town]], [[Wikiville]] |- | '''language''' | The language the magazine is printed in. | style="text-align:center;" |English or, for language names unlikely to be familiar to readers, [[Xyzish language|Xyzish]] |- | '''website''' | The official website of the magazine. | style="text-align:center;" |{{URL|example.com}} |- ! issn | The [[International Standard Serial Number]] of the magazine. If the magazine has both a print and electronic version with separate ISSNs, use issn and eissn. | |- ! oclc | the [[Online Computer Library Center|OCLC]] number of the magazine (automatically linked to http://WorldCat.org) | |- ! colspan="3" style="background-color: #ccf;color:inherit;" | Circulation breakdown parameters |- | '''paid_circulation''' | The circulation of "paid for" copies of the magazine. | |- | '''unpaid_circulation''' | The circulation of free copies of the magazine. | |- | '''circulation_year''' | The year for which the '''total_circulation''' figure is provided | |- | '''total_circulation''' | The total circulation of the magazine. | |- |} === Long lists === Where long lists of names are required and may cause excessive lengthening of the Infobox, please use the {{tl|hidden}} template. An example usage is shown below. {| class="wikitable" |- | | staff_writer = {{hidden|ta1=left|Staff writers| Tim Edwards
Graham Smith
Tony Ellis
Craig Pearson
Tom Francis
Richard Cobbett
Jim Rossignol
John Walker
Alec Meer
Matt Avery
Chris Buxton
Michael Gapper
[[Kieron Gillen]]
Mike Channell
Tim Stone
Adam Oxford
Quintin Smith
[[Duncan Harris]]
Drew Northcott
David Lyttleton }} |- |} === Circulation data === Periodical circulation data is collected by independent auditing organizations. Basic circulation totals are often available free of charge via the web: ; [[Alliance for Audited Media]]: [https://abcas3.auditedmedia.com/ecirc/index.html Total Circ] ; [[BPA Worldwide]]: [http://www.bpaww.com/bpaww#?targeturl=/bpaww/Content/MainContent/Resources/DataTables.htm&target=2&languageid=1&homepage=/BPAWW/Content/MainContent/Home/index.html&footerpage=/BPAWW/content/maincontent/footer/english.htm Media Stats] ; [[Audit Bureau of Circulations (UK)]]: [https://www.abc.org.uk/verification/print-digital-events Print, Digital and Event Figures] ==TemplateData== {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "Infobox for magazines.", "params": { "italic title": { "label": "DO NOT ADD ANYTHING HERE", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "This is automatically filled by the template. Do not use both firstdate and founded if they are equivalent.", "example": "{{start date|1998|3|13|df=y}}", "suggested": true }, "firstdate": { "label": "First issue", "type": "string", "required": true, "description": "The date of publication of the first issue of the magazine. Do not use both firstdate and founded if they are equivalent.", "example": "{{start date|1998|3|13|df=y}}" }, "finalnumber": { "label": "Final issue number", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The edition number of the final issue.", "example": "Vol 77 No 88" }, "finaldate": { "label": "Final issue", "type": "string", "required": false, "aliases": [ "lastdate" ], "description": "The date of the final issue of the magazine.", "example": "31 April 1999" }, "company": { "label": "Company", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The company that publishes the magazine.", "suggested": true }, "country": { "label": "Country", "type": "string", "required": true, "description": "Country of origin.", "example": "United Kingdom" }, "based": { "label": "Based in", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The town/city that the magazine is based in.", "example": "[[Los Angeles]], California, United States", "suggested": true }, "language": { "label": "Language", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The language the magazine is printed in.", "example": "English", "suggested": true }, "website": { "label": "Website", "type": "url", "required": false, "description": "The official website of the magazine." }, "issn": { "label": "ISSN", "type": "string", "required": false, "aliases": [ "ISSN" ], "description": "The International Standard Serial Number of the magazine. If the magazine has both a print and electronic version with separate ISSNs, use parameters \"ISSN\" and \"eISSN\"." }, "eissn": { "label": "eISSN", "type": "string", "required": false, "aliases": [ "eISSN" ] }, "oclc": { "label": "OCLC", "type": "string", "required": false, "aliases": [ "OCLC" ], "description": "The OCLC number of the magazine (automatically linked to http://WorldCat.org)." } }, "paramOrder": [ "italic title", "title", "logo", "logo_size", "image_file", "image_size", "image_alt", "image_page", "image_caption", "editor", "editor_title", "editor2", "editor_title2", "editor3", "editor_title3", "editor4", "editor_title4", "editor5", "editor_title5", "editor6", "editor_title6", "previous_editor", "staff_writer", "photographer", "category", "frequency", "format", "circulation", "publisher", "founder", "founded", "firstdate", "finaldate", "finalnumber", "company", "country", "based", "language", "website", "issn", "eissn", "oclc", "paid_circulation", "unpaid_circulation", "circulation_year", "total_circulation" ], "format": "block" } == Microformat == {{UF-hprod}} == Tracking category == * {{clc|Pages using infobox magazine with unknown parameters}} == See also == * {{tl|Infobox journal}} * {{TL|Infobox newspaper}} {{Organization infoboxes}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Magazine templates]] [[Category:Organization infobox templates|Magazine]] [[Category:Publishing infobox templates|Magazine]] [[Category:Templates that add a tracking category]] [[Category:WikiProject Journalism templates]] [[Category:WikiProject Magazines templates]] }}

{{Documentation subpage}} {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||{{High-use}}}} {{Auto italic title}} {{Lua|Module:Infobox|Module:InfoboxImage|Module:Check for unknown parameters}} == Usage == {{Parameter names example | italic title | title | logo | logo_size | image_size | image_file | image_alt | image_page | image_caption | editor_title | editor | editor_title2 | editor2 | editor_title3 | editor3 | editor_title4 | editor4 | editor_title5 | editor5 | editor_title6 | editor6 | previous_editor | staff_writer | photographer | category | frequency | format | circulation | publisher | paid_circulation | unpaid_circulation | circulation_year | total_circulation | founder | founded | firstdate | finalnumber | finaldate | company | country | based | language | website | issn | eissn | oclc }} To use this template please add the following code to the top of the article. ''Note: If you have no information for a certain parameter please just blank it rather than removing it so that other editors can see that it needs adding at a later stage'' {{Infobox magazine | title = | logo = | logo_size = | image_file = | image_size = | image_alt = | image_caption = | native_name = | editor = | editor_title = | previous_editor = | staff_writer = | photographer = | category = | frequency = | format = | circulation = | publisher = | paid_circulation = | unpaid_circulation = | circulation_year = | total_circulation = | founder = | founded = | firstdate = | finaldate = | finalnumber = | company = | country = | based = | language = | website = | issn = | eissn = | oclc = }} {{clear}} If the magazine is defunct, include the '''finaldate''' and '''finalnumber''' parameters. If the magazine is still publishing, then these parameters should be omitted entirely: | finaldate = | finalnumber = If a breakdown into paid, unpaid and total circulation figures is desired, use the following lines instead of the '''circulation''' parameter: | paid_circulation = | unpaid_circulation = | circulation_year = | total_circulation = The '''company''' parameter should list the publishing company. The '''publisher''' parameter should be the named person who publishes the magazine. The '''previous_editor''' parameter should include earlier, notable, editors. In particular, the ''founding'' editor (if different from current editor), to a reasonable maximum number. If '''image_file''' is a .djvu and a particular page is desired, then use the '''image_page''' parameter: | image_page = If other editing positions are required (e.g. Senior Editor or Associate Editor), use the additional editor fields show below. | editor2 = | editor_title2 = | editor3 = | editor_title3 = | editor4 = | editor_title4 = | editor5 = | editor_title5 = | editor6 = | editor_title6 = === Parameter explanations and examples === A list of each field, what it is for and an example entry. Required parameters are asterisked (*). {| class="wikitable" ! Parameter ! Explanation ! Example |- ! title* | The name of the magazine. | style="text-align:center;" |The Wikipedian |- | '''logo''' | A logo relevant to the magazine. | style="text-align:center;" |Logo.png |- | '''logo_size''' | The size of the logo. | style="text-align:center;" | 200px
(Will default to 180px if no size is stated) |- | '''image_file''' | An image relevant to the magazine. ''(Usually the cover)''. | style="text-align:center;" |Image.png |- | '''image_size''' | The size of the image. | style="text-align:center;" | 200px
(Will default to 180px if no size is stated) |- | '''image_alt''' | A description of the image's visual appearance, suitable for someone who cannot see the image. See [[WP:ALT]]. | style="text-align:center;" |Mostly-assembled globe of puzzle pieces, each with a letter in a different script. The caption says "WikipediA: The Free Encyclopedia". |- | '''image_page''' | The desired page (for .djvu files). | style="text-align:center;" |7 |- | '''image_caption''' | A description of the image. | style="text-align:center;" |''The Wikipedian'' Issue 169, cover dated 31 November 1909 |- | '''native_name''' | The name of the magazine in its native language and script | style="text-align:center;" | |- | '''editor''' | The name of the editor of the magazine. (Must be used in conjunction with '''editor_title''' field) | style="text-align:center;" |[[:en:John Smith|John Smith]] |- | '''editor_title''' | The editor's job title. Editor, Editor-in-Chief etc. | style="text-align:center;" |Editor |- | '''editor2''' | The name of second editor. | |- | '''editor_title2''' | The second editor's job title. | |- | '''editor3''' | The name of third editor. | |- | '''editor_title3''' | The third editor's job title. | |- | '''previous_editor''' | Notable preceding Editors. ''(See Long Lists section below)'' | style="text-align:center;" |[[Jim Smith]] |- | '''staff_writer''' | Staff Writer(s). (Please break multiple lines with
)
''(See Long Lists section below)'' | style="text-align:center;" |[[Alan Smithee]]
[[Jane Smithee]] |- | '''photographer''' | Photographer(s). (Please break multiple lines with
)
''(See Long Lists section below)'' | style="text-align:center;" |[[Annie Smithee]]
[[Judy Smithee]] |- ! category* | The subject group of the magazine, e.g., Sport, Nature, History. Use as many as necessary. | style="text-align:center;" |[[:en:Science|Science]], [[:en:Sport|Sport]], [[:en:History|History]] |- ! frequency* | Monthly, weekly, daily, etc. | style="text-align:center;" |Monthly |- ! format* | paper size | style="text-align:center;" |A4 |- | '''circulation''' | Circulation figures.
''(If circulation breakdown required/available, leave this field blank and see fields lower down this table)''. | style="text-align:center;" |50,000 |- | '''publisher''' | The '''person''' that publishes the magazine. (''Do not put companies in this field. Use the company field below.'') | style="text-align:center;" |[[:en:John Smith|John Smith]] |- | '''founder''' | The '''person''' that founded the magazine. (''Do not put companies in this field. Use the company field below.'') | style="text-align:center;" |[[:en:John Smith|John Smith]] |- | '''founded''' | The date the magazine company was founded. | style="text-align:center;" |{{start date|1998|3|13|df=y}} |- ! firstdate* | The date of publication of the first issue of the magazine. | style="text-align:center;" |{{start date|1998|3|13|df=y}} |- | '''finaldate''' | The date of the final issue of the magazine.
''(Only use if the magazine has ceased publication)'' | style="text-align:center;" |31 April 1999 |- | '''finalnumber''' | The edition number of the final issue.
''(Only use if the magazine has ceased publication)'' | style="text-align:center;" |Vol 77 No 88 |- | '''company''' | The '''company''' that publishes the magazine. | style="text-align:center;" |[[The magazine publishing company]] |- ! country* | Country of origin. e.g. United Kingdom | style="text-align:center;" |United Kingdom |- | '''based''' | The town/city that the magazine is based in. | style="text-align:center;" |[[Wiki Town]], [[Wikiville]] |- | '''language''' | The language the magazine is printed in. | style="text-align:center;" |English or, for language names unlikely to be familiar to readers, [[Xyzish language|Xyzish]] |- | '''website''' | The official website of the magazine. | style="text-align:center;" |{{URL|example.com}} |- ! issn | The [[:en:International Standard Serial Number|International Standard Serial Number]] of the magazine. If the magazine has both a print and electronic version with separate ISSNs, use issn and eissn. | |- ! oclc | the [[:en:Online Computer Library Center|OCLC]] number of the magazine (automatically linked to http://WorldCat.org) | |- ! colspan="3" style="background-color: #ccf;" | Circulation breakdown parameters |- | '''paid_circulation''' | The circulation of "paid for" copies of the magazine. | |- | '''unpaid_circulation''' | The circulation of free copies of the magazine. | |- | '''circulation_year''' | The year for which the '''total_circulation''' figure is provided | |- | '''total_circulation''' | The total circulation of the magazine. | |- |} === Long lists === Where long lists of names are required and may cause excessive lengthening of the Infobox, please use the {{tl|hidden}} template. An example usage is shown below. {| class="wikitable" |- | | staff_writer = {{hidden|ta1=left|Staff writers| Tim Edwards
Graham Smith
Tony Ellis
Craig Pearson
Tom Francis
Richard Cobbett
Jim Rossignol
John Walker
Alec Meer
Matt Avery
Chris Buxton
Michael Gapper
[[Kieron Gillen]]
Mike Channell
Tim Stone
Adam Oxford
Quintin Smith
[[Duncan Harris]]
Drew Northcott
David Lyttleton }} |- |} === Circulation data === Periodical circulation data is collected by independent auditing organizations. Basic circulation totals are often available free of charge via the web: ; [[:en:Alliance for Audited Media|Alliance for Audited Media]]: [https://abcas3.auditedmedia.com/ecirc/index.html Total Circ] ; [[:en:BPA Worldwide|BPA Worldwide]]: [http://www.bpaww.com/bpaww#?targeturl=/bpaww/Content/MainContent/Resources/DataTables.htm&target=2&languageid=1&homepage=/BPAWW/Content/MainContent/Home/index.html&footerpage=/BPAWW/content/maincontent/footer/english.htm Media Stats] ; [[:en:Audit Bureau of Circulations (UK)|Audit Bureau of Circulations (UK)]]: [https://www.abc.org.uk/verification/print-digital-events Print, Digital and Event Figures] ==TemplateData== {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "Infobox for magazines.", "params": { "italic title": { "label": "DO NOT ADD ANYTHING HERE", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "This is automatically filled by the template. Do not touch this." }, "title": { "label": "Title", "description": "Name of the magazine.", "type": "string", "required": true }, "logo": { "label": "Logo", "type": "wiki-file-name", "required": false, "suggested": true }, "logo_size": { "label": "Logo size", "description": "The size of the logo image.", "type": "number", "required": false }, "image_size": { "label": "Image size", "type": "number", "required": false }, "image_file": { "label": "Image", "type": "wiki-file-name", "required": false, "description": "An image relevant to the magazine. Usually the cover.", "suggested": true }, "image_alt": { "label": "Image alt text", "type": "content", "required": false, "description": "A description of the image's visual appearance, suitable for someone who cannot see the image.", "example": "Mostly-assembled globe of puzzle pieces, each with a letter in a different script. The caption says \"WikipediA: The Free Encyclopedia\"." }, "image_page": { "label": "Page of image?", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The desired page (for .djvu files).", "example": "7" }, "image_caption": { "label": "Image caption", "type": "content", "required": false, "aliases": [ "caption" ], "example": "The Wikipedian Issue 169, cover dated 31 November 1909", "suggested": true }, "editor_title": { "label": "Editor title", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The editor's job title.", "example": "Editor-in-Chief" }, "editor": { "label": "Editor", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The name of the editor of the magazine. Must be used in conjunction with the \"Editor title\" field.", "example": "[[:en:John Smith|John Smith]]", "suggested": true }, "editor_title2": { "label": "Editor 2's title", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The second editor's job title." }, "editor2": { "label": "Editor 2", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The name of the second editor." }, "editor_title3": { "label": "Editor 3's title", "type": "string", "required": false }, "editor3": { "label": "Editor 3", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "I think you see where this is going." }, "editor_title4": { "label": "Editor 4's title", "type": "string", "required": false }, "editor4": { "label": "Editor 4", "type": "string", "required": false }, "editor_title5": { "label": "Editor 5's title", "type": "string", "required": false }, "editor5": { "label": "Editor 5", "type": "string", "required": false }, "editor_title6": { "label": "Editor 6's title", "type": "string", "required": false }, "editor6": { "label": "Editor 6", "type": "string", "required": false }, "previous_editor": { "label": "Former editor(s)", "type": "content", "required": false, "description": "Notable preceding editor(s)." }, "staff_writer": { "label": "Staff writer(s)", "type": "content", "required": false }, "photographer": { "label": "Photographer(s)", "type": "content", "required": false }, "category": { "label": "Categories", "type": "content", "required": true, "description": "The subject group of the magazine, e.g., Sport, Nature, History. Use as many as necessary.", "example": "[[:en:Science|Science]], [[:en:Sport|Sport]], [[:en:History|History]]" }, "frequency": { "label": "Frequency", "type": "string", "required": true, "description": "Frequency of the magazine. Monthly, weekly, daily, etc." }, "format": { "label": "Format", "type": "string", "description": "Paper size.", "example": "A4" }, "circulation": { "label": "Circulation", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "Circulation figures. If circulation breakdown available, leave this field blank and see fields lower down.", "example": "50,000" }, "publisher": { "label": "Publisher", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The person that publishes the magazine. Do not put companies in this field." }, "paid_circulation": { "label": "Paid circulation", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The circulation of \"paid for\" copies of the magazine." }, "unpaid_circulation": { "label": "Unpaid circulation", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The circulation of free copies of the magazine." }, "circulation_year": { "label": "Circulation year", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The year for which the \"Total circulation\" figure is provided." }, "total_circulation": { "label": "Total circulation", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The total circulation of the magazine." }, "founder": { "label": "Founder", "type": "string", "required": false, "aliases": [ "creator" ], "description": "The person that founded the magazine. Do not put companies in this field." }, "founded": { "label": "Founded", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The date the magazine company was founded.", "example": "{{start date|1998|3|13|df=y}}", "suggested": true }, "firstdate": { "label": "First issue", "type": "string", "required": true, "description": "The date of publication of the first issue of the magazine.", "example": "{{start date|1998|3|13|df=y}}" }, "finalnumber": { "label": "Final issue number", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The edition number of the final issue.", "example": "Vol 77 No 88" }, "finaldate": { "label": "Final issue", "type": "string", "required": false, "aliases": [ "lastdate" ], "description": "The date of the final issue of the magazine.", "example": "31 April 1999" }, "company": { "label": "Company", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The company that publishes the magazine.", "suggested": true }, "country": { "label": "Country", "type": "string", "required": true, "description": "Country of origin.", "example": "United Kingdom" }, "based": { "label": "Based in", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The town/city that the magazine is based in.", "example": "[[:en:New York City|New York City]], [[:en:New York|New York]], [[:en:United States|United States]]", "suggested": true }, "language": { "label": "Language", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The language the magazine is printed in.", "example": "English", "suggested": true }, "website": { "label": "Website", "type": "url", "required": false, "description": "The official website of the magazine." }, "issn": { "label": "ISSN", "type": "string", "required": false, "aliases": [ "ISSN" ], "description": "The International Standard Serial Number of the magazine. If the magazine has both a print and electronic version with separate ISSNs, use parameters \"ISSN\" and \"eISSN\"." }, "eissn": { "label": "eISSN", "type": "string", "required": false, "aliases": [ "eISSN" ] }, "oclc": { "label": "OCLC", "type": "string", "required": false, "aliases": [ "OCLC" ], "description": "The OCLC number of the magazine (automatically linked to http://WorldCat.org)." } }, "paramOrder": [ "italic title", "title", "logo", "logo_size", "image_file", "image_size", "image_alt", "image_page", "image_caption", "editor", "editor_title", "editor2", "editor_title2", "editor3", "editor_title3", "editor4", "editor_title4", "editor5", "editor_title5", "editor6", "editor_title6", "previous_editor", "staff_writer", "photographer", "category", "frequency", "format", "circulation", "publisher", "founder", "founded", "firstdate", "finaldate", "finalnumber", "company", "country", "based", "language", "website", "issn", "eissn", "oclc", "paid_circulation", "unpaid_circulation", "circulation_year", "total_circulation" ], "format": "block" } == Microformat == {{UF-hprod}} == Tracking category == * {{clc|Pages using infobox magazine with unsupported parameters}} == See also == * {{tl|Infobox journal}} * {{TL|Infobox newspaper}} {{Organization infoboxes}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Magazine templates]] [[Category:Organization infobox templates|Magazine]] [[Category:Publishing infobox templates|Magazine]] [[Category:s that add a tracking category]] [[Category:WikiProject Journalism templates]] [[Category:WikiProject Magazines templates]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

{{Documentation subpage}} {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||{{High-use}}}} {{Auto italic title}} {{Lua|Module:Infobox|Module:InfoboxImage|Module:Check for unknown parameters}} == Usage == {{Parameter names example | italic title | title | logo | logo_size | image_size | image_file | image_alt | image_page | image_caption | editor_title | editor | editor_title2 | editor2 | editor_title3 | editor3 | editor_title4 | editor4 | editor_title5 | editor5 | editor_title6 | editor6 | previous_editor | staff_writer | photographer | category | frequency | format | circulation | publisher | paid_circulation | unpaid_circulation | circulation_year | total_circulation | founder | founded | firstdate | finalnumber | finaldate | company | country | based | language | website | issn | eissn | oclc }} To use this template please add the following code to the top of the article. ''Note: If you have no information for a certain parameter please just blank it rather than removing it so that other editors can see that it needs adding at a later stage'' {{Infobox magazine | title = | logo = | logo_size = | image_file = | image_size = | image_alt = | image_caption = | native_name = | editor = | editor_title = | previous_editor = | staff_writer = | photographer = | category = | frequency = | format = | circulation = | publisher = | paid_circulation = | unpaid_circulation = | circulation_year = | total_circulation = | founder = | founded = | firstdate = | finaldate = | finalnumber = | company = | country = | based = | language = | website = | issn = | eissn = | oclc = }} {{clear}} If the magazine is defunct, include the '''finaldate''' and '''finalnumber''' parameters. If the magazine is still publishing, then these parameters should be omitted entirely: | finaldate = | finalnumber = If a breakdown into paid, unpaid and total circulation figures is desired, use the following lines instead of the '''circulation''' parameter: | paid_circulation = | unpaid_circulation = | circulation_year = | total_circulation = The '''company''' parameter should list the publishing company. The '''publisher''' parameter should be the named person who publishes the magazine. The '''previous_editor''' parameter should include earlier, notable, editors. In particular, the ''founding'' editor (if different from current editor), to a reasonable maximum number. If '''image_file''' is a .djvu and a particular page is desired, then use the '''image_page''' parameter: | image_page = If other editing positions are required (e.g. Senior Editor or Associate Editor), use the additional editor fields show below. | editor2 = | editor_title2 = | editor3 = | editor_title3 = | editor4 = | editor_title4 = | editor5 = | editor_title5 = | editor6 = | editor_title6 = === Parameter explanations and examples === A list of each field, what it is for and an example entry. Required parameters are asterisked (*). {| class="wikitable" ! Parameter ! Explanation ! Example |- ! title* | The name of the magazine. | style="text-align:center;" |The Wikipedian |- | '''logo''' | A logo relevant to the magazine. | style="text-align:center;" |Logo.png |- | '''logo_size''' | The size of the logo. | style="text-align:center;" | 200px
(Will default to 180px if no size is stated) |- | '''image_file''' | An image relevant to the magazine. ''(Usually the cover)''. | style="text-align:center;" |Image.png |- | '''image_size''' | The size of the image. | style="text-align:center;" | 200px
(Will default to 180px if no size is stated) |- | '''image_alt''' | A description of the image's visual appearance, suitable for someone who cannot see the image. See [[WP:ALT]]. | style="text-align:center;" |Mostly-assembled globe of puzzle pieces, each with a letter in a different script. The caption says "WikipediA: The Free Encyclopedia". |- | '''image_page''' | The desired page (for .djvu files). | style="text-align:center;" |7 |- | '''image_caption''' | A description of the image. | style="text-align:center;" |''The Wikipedian'' Issue 169, cover dated 31 November 1909 |- | '''native_name''' | The name of the magazine in its native language and script | style="text-align:center;" | |- | '''editor''' | The name of the editor of the magazine. (Must be used in conjunction with '''editor_title''' field) | style="text-align:center;" |[[:en:John Smith|John Smith]] |- | '''editor_title''' | The editor's job title. Editor, Editor-in-Chief etc. | style="text-align:center;" |Editor |- | '''editor2''' | The name of second editor. | |- | '''editor_title2''' | The second editor's job title. | |- | '''editor3''' | The name of third editor. | |- | '''editor_title3''' | The third editor's job title. | |- | '''previous_editor''' | Notable preceding Editors. ''(See Long Lists section below)'' | style="text-align:center;" |[[Jim Smith]] |- | '''staff_writer''' | Staff Writer(s). (Please break multiple lines with
)
''(See Long Lists section below)'' | style="text-align:center;" |[[Alan Smithee]]
[[Jane Smithee]] |- | '''photographer''' | Photographer(s). (Please break multiple lines with
)
''(See Long Lists section below)'' | style="text-align:center;" |[[Annie Smithee]]
[[Judy Smithee]] |- ! category* | The subject group of the magazine, e.g., Sport, Nature, History. Use as many as necessary. | style="text-align:center;" |[[:en:Science|Science]], [[:en:Sport|Sport]], [[:en:History|History]] |- ! frequency* | Monthly, weekly, daily, etc. | style="text-align:center;" |Monthly |- ! format* | paper size | style="text-align:center;" |A4 |- | '''circulation''' | Circulation figures.
''(If circulation breakdown required/available, leave this field blank and see fields lower down this table)''. | style="text-align:center;" |50,000 |- | '''publisher''' | The '''person''' that publishes the magazine. (''Do not put companies in this field. Use the company field below.'') | style="text-align:center;" |[[:en:John Smith|John Smith]] |- | '''founder''' | The '''person''' that founded the magazine. (''Do not put companies in this field. Use the company field below.'') | style="text-align:center;" |[[:en:John Smith|John Smith]] |- | '''founded''' | The date the magazine company was founded. | style="text-align:center;" |{{start date|1998|3|13|df=y}} |- ! firstdate* | The date of publication of the first issue of the magazine. | style="text-align:center;" |{{start date|1998|3|13|df=y}} |- | '''finaldate''' | The date of the final issue of the magazine.
''(Only use if the magazine has ceased publication)'' | style="text-align:center;" |31 April 1999 |- | '''finalnumber''' | The edition number of the final issue.
''(Only use if the magazine has ceased publication)'' | style="text-align:center;" |Vol 77 No 88 |- | '''company''' | The '''company''' that publishes the magazine. | style="text-align:center;" |[[The magazine publishing company]] |- ! country* | Country of origin. e.g. United Kingdom | style="text-align:center;" |United Kingdom |- | '''based''' | The town/city that the magazine is based in. | style="text-align:center;" |[[Wiki Town]], [[Wikiville]] |- | '''language''' | The language the magazine is printed in. | style="text-align:center;" |English or, for language names unlikely to be familiar to readers, [[Xyzish language|Xyzish]] |- | '''website''' | The official website of the magazine. | style="text-align:center;" |{{URL|example.com}} |- ! issn | The [[:en:International Standard Serial Number|International Standard Serial Number]] of the magazine. If the magazine has both a print and electronic version with separate ISSNs, use issn and eissn. | |- ! oclc | the [[:en:Online Computer Library Center|OCLC]] number of the magazine (automatically linked to http://WorldCat.org) | |- ! colspan="3" style="background-color: #ccf;" | Circulation breakdown parameters |- | '''paid_circulation''' | The circulation of "paid for" copies of the magazine. | |- | '''unpaid_circulation''' | The circulation of free copies of the magazine. | |- | '''circulation_year''' | The year for which the '''total_circulation''' figure is provided | |- | '''total_circulation''' | The total circulation of the magazine. | |- |} === Long lists === Where long lists of names are required and may cause excessive lengthening of the Infobox, please use the {{tl|hidden}} template. An example usage is shown below. {| class="wikitable" |- | | staff_writer = {{hidden|ta1=left|Staff writers| Tim Edwards

Do not touch this." }, "title": { "label": "Title", "description": "Name of the magazine.", "type": "string", "required": true }, "logo": { "label": "Logo", "type": "wiki-file-name", "required": false, "suggested": true }, "logo_size": { "label": "Logo size", "description": "The size of the logo image.", "type": "number", "required": false }, "image_size": { "label": "Image size", "type": "number", "required": false }, "image_file": { "label": "Image", "type": "wiki-file-name", "required": false, "description": "An image relevant to the magazine. Usually the cover.", "suggested": true }, "image_alt": { "label": "Image alt text", "type": "content", "required": false, "description": "A description of the image's visual appearance, suitable for someone who cannot see the image.", "example": "Mostly-assembled globe of puzzle pieces, each with a letter in a different script. Must be used in conjunction with the \"Editor title\" field.", "example": "[[:en:John Smith|John Smith]]", "suggested": true }, "editor_title2": { "label": "Editor 2's title", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The second editor's job title." }, "editor2": { "label": "Editor 2", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The name of the second editor." }, "editor_title3": { "label": "Editor 3's title", "type": "string", "required": false }, "editor3": { "label": "Editor 3", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "I think you see where this is going." }, "editor_title4": { "label": "Editor 4's title", "type": "string", "required": false }, "editor4": { "label": "Editor 4", "type": "string", "required": false }, "editor_title5": { "label": "Editor 5's title", "type": "string", "required": false }, "editor5": { "label": "Editor 5", "type": "string", "required": false }, "editor_title6": { "label": "Editor 6's title", "type": "string", "required": false }, "editor6": { "label": "Editor 6", "type": "string", "required": false }, "previous_editor": { "label": "Former editor(s)", "type": "content", "required": false, "description": "Notable preceding editor(s)." }, "staff_writer": { "label": "Staff writer(s)", "type": "content", "required": false }, "photographer": { "label": "Photographer(s)", "type": "content", "required": false }, "category": { "label": "Categories", "type": "content", "required": true, "description": "The subject group of the magazine, e.g., Sport, Nature, History. If the magazine has both a print and electronic version with separate ISSNs, use parameters \"ISSN\" and \"eISSN\"." }, "eissn": { "label": "eISSN", "type": "string", "required": false, "aliases": [ "eISSN" ] }, "oclc": { "label": "OCLC", "type": "string", "required": false, "aliases": [ "OCLC" ], "description": "The OCLC number of the magazine (automatically linked to http://WorldCat.org)." } }, "paramOrder": [ "italic title", "title", "logo", "logo_size", "image_file", "image_size", "image_alt", "image_page", "image_caption", "editor", "editor_title", "editor2", "editor_title2", "editor3", "editor_title3", "editor4", "editor_title4", "editor5", "editor_title5", "editor6", "editor_title6", "previous_editor", "staff_writer", "photographer", "category", "frequency", "format", "circulation", "publisher", "founder", "founded", "firstdate", "finaldate", "finalnumber", "company", "country", "based", "language", "website", "issn", "eissn", "oclc", "paid_circulation", "unpaid_circulation", "circulation_year", "total_circulation" ], "format": "block" } == Microformat == {{UF-hprod}} == Tracking category == * {{clc|Pages using infobox magazine with unsupported parameters}} == See also == * {{tl|Infobox journal}} * {{TL|Infobox newspaper}} {{Organization infoboxes}} {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Magazine templates]] [[Category:Organization infobox templates|Magazine]] [[Category:Publishing infobox templates|Magazine]] [[Category:s that add a tracking category]] [[Category:WikiProject Journalism templates]] [[Category:WikiProject Magazines templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{Documentation subpage}} {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||{{High-use}}}} {{Auto italic title}} {{Lua|Module:Infobox|Module:InfoboxImage|Module:Check for unknown parameters}} == Usage == {{Parameter names example | italic title | title | logo | logo_size | image_size | image_file | image_alt | image_page | image_caption | editor_title | editor | editor_title2 | editor2 | editor_title3 | editor3 | editor_title4 | editor4 | editor_title5 | editor5 | editor_title6 | editor6 | previous_editor | staff_writer | photographer | category | frequency | format | circulation | publisher | paid_circulation | unpaid_circulation | circulation_year | total_circulation | founder | founded | firstdate | finalnumber | finaldate | company | country | based | language | website | issn | eissn | oclc }} To use this template please add the following code to the top of the article. ''Note: If you have no information for a certain parameter please just blank it rather than removing it so that other editors can see that it needs adding at a later stage'' {{Infobox magazine | title = | logo = | logo_size = | image_file = | image_size = | image_alt = | image_caption = | native_name = | editor = | editor_title = | previous_editor = | staff_writer = | photographer = | category = | frequency = | format = | circulation = | publisher = | paid_circulation = | unpaid_circulation = | circulation_year = | total_circulation = | founder = | founded = | firstdate = | finaldate = | finalnumber = | company = | country = | based = | language = | website = | issn = | eissn = | oclc = }} {{clear}} If the magazine is defunct, include the '''finaldate''' and '''finalnumber''' parameters. If the magazine is still publishing, then these parameters should be omitted entirely: | finaldate = | finalnumber = If a breakdown into paid, unpaid and total circulation figures is desired, use the following lines instead of the '''circulation''' parameter: | paid_circulation = | unpaid_circulation = | circulation_year = | total_circulation = The '''company''' parameter should list the publishing company. The '''publisher''' parameter should be the named person who publishes the magazine. The '''previous_editor''' parameter should include earlier, notable, editors. In particular, the ''founding'' editor (if different from current editor), to a reasonable maximum number. If '''image_file''' is a .djvu and a particular page is desired, then use the '''image_page''' parameter: | image_page = If other editing positions are required (e.g. Senior Editor or Associate Editor), use the additional editor fields show below. | editor2 = | editor_title2 = | editor3 = | editor_title3 = | editor4 = | editor_title4 = | editor5 = | editor_title5 = | editor6 = | editor_title6 = === Parameter explanations and examples === A list of each field, what it is for and an example entry. Required parameters are asterisked (*). {| class="wikitable" ! Parameter ! Explanation ! Example |- ! title* | The name of the magazine. | style="text-align:center;" |The Wikipedian |- | '''logo''' | A logo relevant to the magazine. | style="text-align:center;" |Logo.png |- | '''logo_size''' | The size of the logo. | style="text-align:center;" | 200px
(Will default to 180px if no size is stated) |- | '''image_file''' | An image relevant to the magazine. ''(Usually the cover)''. | style="text-align:center;" |Image.png |- | '''image_size''' | The size of the image. | style="text-align:center;" | 200px
(Will default to 180px if no size is stated) |- | '''image_alt''' | A description of the image's visual appearance, suitable for someone who cannot see the image. See [[WP:ALT]]. | style="text-align:center;" |Mostly-assembled globe of puzzle pieces, each with a letter in a different script. The caption says "WikipediA: The Free Encyclopedia". |- | '''image_page''' | The desired page (for .djvu files). | style="text-align:center;" |7 |- | '''image_caption''' | A description of the image. | style="text-align:center;" |''The Wikipedian'' Issue 169, cover dated 31 November 1909 |- | '''native_name''' | The name of the magazine in its native language and script | style="text-align:center;" | |- | '''editor''' | The name of the editor of the magazine. (Must be used in conjunction with '''editor_title''' field) | style="text-align:center;" |[[:en:John Smith|John Smith]] |- | '''editor_title''' | The editor's job title. Editor, Editor-in-Chief etc. | style="text-align:center;" |Editor |- | '''editor2''' | The name of second editor. | |- | '''editor_title2''' | The second editor's job title. | |- | '''editor3''' | The name of third editor. | |- | '''editor_title3''' | The third editor's job title. | |- | '''previous_editor''' | Notable preceding Editors. ''(See Long Lists section below)'' | style="text-align:center;" |[[Jim Smith]] |- | '''staff_writer''' | Staff Writer(s). (Please break multiple lines with
)
''(See Long Lists section below)'' | style="text-align:center;" |[[Alan Smithee]]
[[Jane Smithee]] |- | '''photographer''' | Photographer(s). (Please break multiple lines with
)
''(See Long Lists section below)'' | style="text-align:center;" |[[Annie Smithee]]
[[Judy Smithee]] |- ! category* | The subject group of the magazine, e.g., Sport, Nature, History. Use as many as necessary. | style="text-align:center;" |[[:en:Science|Science]], [[:en:Sport|Sport]], [[:en:History|History]] |- ! frequency* | Monthly, weekly, daily, etc. | style="text-align:center;" |Monthly |- ! format* | paper size | style="text-align:center;" |A4 |- | '''circulation''' | Circulation figures.
''(If circulation breakdown required/available, leave this field blank and see fields lower down this table)''. | style="text-align:center;" |50,000 |- | '''publisher''' | The '''person''' that publishes the magazine. (''Do not put companies in this field. Use the company field below.'') | style="text-align:center;" |[[:en:John Smith|John Smith]] |- | '''founder''' | The '''person''' that founded the magazine. (''Do not put companies in this field. Use the company field below.'') | style="text-align:center;" |[[:en:John Smith|John Smith]] |- | '''founded''' | The date the magazine company was founded. | style="text-align:center;" |{{start date|1998|3|13|df=y}} |- ! firstdate* | The date of publication of the first issue of the magazine. | style="text-align:center;" |{{start date|1998|3|13|df=y}} |- | '''finaldate''' | The date of the final issue of the magazine.
''(Only use if the magazine has ceased publication)'' | style="text-align:center;" |31 April 1999 |- | '''finalnumber''' | The edition number of the final issue.
''(Only use if the magazine has ceased publication)'' | style="text-align:center;" |Vol 77 No 88 |- | '''company''' | The '''company''' that publishes the magazine. | style="text-align:center;" |[[The magazine publishing company]] |- ! country* | Country of origin. e.g. United Kingdom | style="text-align:center;" |United Kingdom |- | '''based''' | The town/city that the magazine is based in. | style="text-align:center;" |[[Wiki Town]], [[Wikiville]] |- | '''language''' | The language the magazine is printed in. | style="text-align:center;" |English or, for language names unlikely to be familiar to readers, [[Xyzish language|Xyzish]] |- | '''website''' | The official website of the magazine. | style="text-align:center;" |{{URL|example.com}} |- ! issn | The [[:en:International Standard Serial Number|International Standard Serial Number]] of the magazine. If the magazine has both a print and electronic version with separate ISSNs, use issn and eissn. | |- ! oclc | the [[:en:Online Computer Library Center|OCLC]] number of the magazine (automatically linked to http://WorldCat.org) | |- ! colspan="3" style="background-color: #ccf;" | Circulation breakdown parameters |- | '''paid_circulation''' | The circulation of "paid for" copies of the magazine. | |- | '''unpaid_circulation''' | The circulation of free copies of the magazine. | |- | '''circulation_year''' | The year for which the '''total_circulation''' figure is provided | |- | '''total_circulation''' | The total circulation of the magazine. | |- |} === Long lists === Where long lists of names are required and may cause excessive lengthening of the Infobox, please use the {{tl|hidden}} template. An example usage is shown below. {| class="wikitable" |- | | staff_writer = {{hidden|ta1=left|Staff writers| Tim Edwards
Graham Smith
Tony Ellis
Craig Pearson
Tom Francis
Richard Cobbett
Jim Rossignol
John Walker
Alec Meer
Matt Avery
Chris Buxton
Michael Gapper
[[Kieron Gillen]]
Mike Channell
Tim Stone
Adam Oxford
Quintin Smith
[[Duncan Harris]]
Drew Northcott
David Lyttleton }} |- |} === Circulation data === Periodical circulation data is collected by independent auditing organizations. Basic circulation totals are often available free of charge via the web: ; [[:en:Alliance for Audited Media|Alliance for Audited Media]]: [https://abcas3.auditedmedia.com/ecirc/index.html Total Circ] ; [[:en:BPA Worldwide|BPA Worldwide]]: [http://www.bpaww.com/bpaww#?targeturl=/bpaww/Content/MainContent/Resources/DataTables.htm&target=2&languageid=1&homepage=/BPAWW/Content/MainContent/Home/index.html&footerpage=/BPAWW/content/maincontent/footer/english.htm Media Stats] ; [[:en:Audit Bureau of Circulations (UK)|Audit Bureau of Circulations (UK)]]: [https://www.abc.org.uk/verification/print-digital-events Print, Digital and Event Figures] ==TemplateData== {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "Infobox for magazines.", "params": { "italic title": { "label": "DO NOT ADD ANYTHING HERE", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "This is automatically filled by the template. Do not put companies in this field." }, "paid_circulation": { "label": "Paid circulation", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The circulation of \"paid for\" copies of the magazine." }, "unpaid_circulation": { "label": "Unpaid circulation", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The circulation of free copies of the magazine." }, "circulation_year": { "label": "Circulation year", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The year for which the \"Total circulation\" figure is provided." }, "total_circulation": { "label": "Total circulation", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The total circulation of the magazine." }, "founder": { "label": "Founder", "type": "string", "required": false, "aliases": [ "creator" ], "description": "The person that founded the magazine. Do not put companies in this field." }, "founded": { "label": "Founded", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The date the magazine company was founded.", "example": "{{start date|1998|3|13|df=y}}", "suggested": true }, "firstdate": { "label": "First issue", "type": "string", "required": true, "description": "The date of publication of the first issue of the magazine.", "example": "{{start date|1998|3|13|df=y}}" }, "finalnumber": { "label": "Final issue number", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The edition number of the final issue.", "example": "Vol 77 No 88" }, "finaldate": { "label": "Final issue", "type": "string", "required": false, "aliases": [ "lastdate" ], "description": "The date of the final issue of the magazine.", "example": "31 April 1999" }, "company": { "label": "Company", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The company that publishes the magazine.", "suggested": true }, "country": { "label": "Country", "type": "string", "required": true, "description": "Country of origin.", "example": "United Kingdom" }, "based": { "label": "Based in", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The town/city that the magazine is based in.", "example": "[[:en:New York City|New York City]], [[:en:New York|New York]], [[:en:United States|United States]]", "suggested": true }, "language": { "label": "Language", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The language the magazine is printed in.", "example": "English", "suggested": true }, "website": { "label": "Website", "type": "url", "required": false, "description": "The official website of the magazine." }, "issn": { "label": "ISSN", "type": "string", "required": false, "aliases": [ "ISSN" ], "description": "The International Standard Serial Number of the magazine. If the magazine has both a print and electronic version with separate ISSNs, use parameters \"ISSN\" and \"eISSN\"." }, "eissn": { "label": "eISSN", "type": "string", "required": false, "aliases": [ "eISSN" ] }, "oclc": { "label": "OCLC", "type": "string", "required": false, "aliases": [ "OCLC" ], "description": "The OCLC number of the magazine (automatically linked to http://WorldCat.org)." } }, "paramOrder": [ "italic title", "title", "logo", "logo_size", "image_file", "image_size", "image_alt", "image_page", "image_caption", "editor", "editor_title", "editor2", "editor_title2", "editor3", "editor_title3", "editor4", "editor_title4", "editor5", "editor_title5", "editor6", "editor_title6", "previous_editor", "staff_writer", "photographer", "category", "frequency", "format", "circulation", "publisher", "founder", "founded", "firstdate", "finaldate", "finalnumber", "company", "country", "based", "language", "website", "issn", "eissn", "oclc", "paid_circulation", "unpaid_circulation", "circulation_year", "total_circulation" ], "format": "block" } == Microformat == {{UF-hprod}} == Tracking category == * {{clc|Pages using infobox magazine with unsupported parameters}} == See also == * {{tl|Infobox journal}} * {{TL|Infobox newspaper}} {{Organization infoboxes}} {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Magazine templates]] [[Category:Organization infobox templates|Magazine]] [[Category:Publishing infobox templates|Magazine]] [[Category:WikiProject Journalism templates]] [[Category:WikiProject Magazines templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{Documentation subpage}} {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||{{High-use}}}} {{Auto italic title}} {{Lua|Module:Infobox|Module:InfoboxImage|Module:Check for unknown parameters}} == Usage == {{Parameter names example | italic title | title | logo | logo_size | image_size | image_file | image_alt | image_page | image_caption | editor_title | editor | editor_title2 | editor2 | editor_title3 | editor3 | editor_title4 | editor4 | editor_title5 | editor5 | editor_title6 | editor6 | previous_editor | staff_writer | photographer | category | frequency | format | circulation | publisher | paid_circulation | unpaid_circulation | circulation_year | total_circulation | founder | founded | firstdate | finalnumber | finaldate | company | country | based | language | website | issn | eissn | oclc }} To use this template please add the following code to the top of the article. ''Note: If you have no information for a certain parameter please just blank it rather than removing it so that other editors can see that it needs adding at a later stage'' {{Infobox magazine | title = | logo = | logo_size = | image_file = | image_size = | image_alt = | image_caption = | native_name = | editor = | editor_title = | previous_editor = | staff_writer = | photographer = | category = | frequency = | format = | circulation = | publisher = | paid_circulation = | unpaid_circulation = | circulation_year = | total_circulation = | founder = | founded = | firstdate = | finaldate = | finalnumber = | company = | country = | based = | language = | website = | issn = | eissn = | oclc = }} {{clear}} If the magazine is defunct, include the '''finaldate''' and '''finalnumber''' parameters. If the magazine is still publishing, then these parameters should be omitted entirely: | finaldate = | finalnumber = If a breakdown into paid, unpaid and total circulation figures is desired, use the following lines instead of the '''circulation''' parameter: | paid_circulation = | unpaid_circulation = | circulation_year = | total_circulation = The '''company''' parameter should list the publishing company. The '''publisher''' parameter should be the named person who publishes the magazine. The '''previous_editor''' parameter should include earlier, notable, editors. In particular, the ''founding'' editor (if different from current editor), to a reasonable maximum number. If '''image_file''' is a .djvu and a particular page is desired, then use the '''image_page''' parameter: | image_page = If other editing positions are required (e.g. Senior Editor or Associate Editor), use the additional editor fields show below. | editor2 = | editor_title2 = | editor3 = | editor_title3 = | editor4 = | editor_title4 = | editor5 = | editor_title5 = | editor6 = | editor_title6 = === Parameter explanations and examples === A list of each field, what it is for and an example entry. Required parameters are asterisked (*). {| class="wikitable" ! Parameter ! Explanation ! Example |- ! title* | The name of the magazine. | style="text-align:center;" |The Wikipedian |- | '''logo''' | A logo relevant to the magazine. | style="text-align:center;" |Logo.png |- | '''logo_size''' | The size of the logo. | style="text-align:center;" | 200px
(Will default to 180px if no size is stated) |- | '''image_file''' | An image relevant to the magazine. ''(Usually the cover)''. | style="text-align:center;" |Image.png |- | '''image_size''' | The size of the image. | style="text-align:center;" | 200px
(Will default to 180px if no size is stated) |- | '''image_alt''' | A description of the image's visual appearance, suitable for someone who cannot see the image. See [[WP:ALT]]. | style="text-align:center;" |Mostly-assembled globe of puzzle pieces, each with a letter in a different script. The caption says "WikipediA: The Free Encyclopedia". |- | '''image_page''' | The desired page (for .djvu files). | style="text-align:center;" |7 |- | '''image_caption''' | A description of the image. | style="text-align:center;" |''The Wikipedian'' Issue 169, cover dated 31 November 1909 |- | '''native_name''' | The name of the magazine in its native language and script | style="text-align:center;" | |- | '''editor''' | The name of the editor of the magazine. (Must be used in conjunction with '''editor_title''' field) | style="text-align:center;" |[[:en:John Smith|John Smith]] |- | '''editor_title''' | The editor's job title. Editor, Editor-in-Chief etc. | style="text-align:center;" |Editor |- | '''editor2''' | The name of second editor. | |- | '''editor_title2''' | The second editor's job title. | |- | '''editor3''' | The name of third editor. | |- | '''editor_title3''' | The third editor's job title. | |- | '''previous_editor''' | Notable preceding Editors. ''(See Long Lists section below)'' | style="text-align:center;" |[[Jim Smith]] |- | '''staff_writer''' | Staff Writer(s). (Please break multiple lines with
)
''(See Long Lists section below)'' | style="text-align:center;" |[[Alan Smithee]]
[[Jane Smithee]] |- | '''photographer''' | Photographer(s). (Please break multiple lines with
)
''(See Long Lists section below)'' | style="text-align:center;" |[[Annie Smithee]]
[[Judy Smithee]] |- ! category* | The subject group of the magazine, e.g., Sport, Nature, History. Use as many as necessary. | style="text-align:center;" |[[:en:Science|Science]], [[:en:Sport|Sport]], [[:en:History|History]] |- ! frequency* | Monthly, weekly, daily, etc. | style="text-align:center;" |Monthly |- ! format* | paper size | style="text-align:center;" |A4 |- | '''circulation''' | Circulation figures.
''(If circulation breakdown required/available, leave this field blank and see fields lower down this table)''. | style="text-align:center;" |50,000 |- | '''publisher''' | The '''person''' that publishes the magazine. (''Do not put companies in this field. Use the company field below.'') | style="text-align:center;" |[[:en:John Smith|John Smith]] |- | '''founder''' | The '''person''' that founded the magazine. (''Do not put companies in this field. Use the company field below.'') | style="text-align:center;" |[[:en:John Smith|John Smith]] |- | '''founded''' | The date the magazine company was founded. | style="text-align:center;" |{{start date|1998|3|13|df=y}} |- ! firstdate* | The date of publication of the first issue of the magazine. | style="text-align:center;" |{{start date|1998|3|13|df=y}} |- | '''finaldate''' | The date of the final issue of the magazine.
''(Only use if the magazine has ceased publication)'' | style="text-align:center;" |31 April 1999 |- | '''finalnumber''' | The edition number of the final issue.
''(Only use if the magazine has ceased publication)'' | style="text-align:center;" |Vol 77 No 88 |- | '''company''' | The '''company''' that publishes the magazine. | style="text-align:center;" |[[The magazine publishing company]] |- ! country* | Country of origin. e.g. United Kingdom | style="text-align:center;" |United Kingdom |- | '''based''' | The town/city that the magazine is based in. | style="text-align:center;" |[[Wiki Town]], [[Wikiville]] |- | '''language''' | The language the magazine is printed in. | style="text-align:center;" |English or, for language names unlikely to be familiar to readers, [[Xyzish language|Xyzish]] |- | '''website''' | The official website of the magazine. | style="text-align:center;" |{{URL|example.com}} |- ! issn | The [[:en:International Standard Serial Number|International Standard Serial Number]] of the magazine. If the magazine has both a print and electronic version with separate ISSNs, use issn and eissn. | |- ! oclc | the [[:en:Online Computer Library Center|OCLC]] number of the magazine (automatically linked to http://WorldCat.org) | |- ! colspan="3" style="background-color: #ccf;" | Circulation breakdown parameters |- | '''paid_circulation''' | The circulation of "paid for" copies of the magazine. | |- | '''unpaid_circulation''' | The circulation of free copies of the magazine. | |- | '''circulation_year''' | The year for which the '''total_circulation''' figure is provided | |- | '''total_circulation''' | The total circulation of the magazine. | |- |} === Long lists === Where long lists of names are required and may cause excessive lengthening of the Infobox, please use the {{tl|hidden}} template. An example usage is shown below. {| class="wikitable" |- | | staff_writer = {{hidden|ta1=left|Staff writers| Tim Edwards
Graham Smith
Tony Ellis
Craig Pearson
Tom Francis
Richard Cobbett
Jim Rossignol
John Walker
Alec Meer
Matt Avery
Chris Buxton
Michael Gapper
[[Kieron Gillen]]
Mike Channell
Tim Stone
Adam Oxford
Quintin Smith
[[Duncan Harris]]
Drew Northcott
David Lyttleton }} |- |} === Circulation data === Periodical circulation data is collected by independent auditing organizations. Basic circulation totals are often available free of charge via the web: ; [[:en:Alliance for Audited Media|Alliance for Audited Media]]: [https://abcas3.auditedmedia.com/ecirc/index.html Total Circ] ; [[:en:BPA Worldwide|BPA Worldwide]]: [http://www.bpaww.com/bpaww#?targeturl=/bpaww/Content/MainContent/Resources/DataTables.htm&target=2&languageid=1&homepage=/BPAWW/Content/MainContent/Home/index.html&footerpage=/BPAWW/content/maincontent/footer/english.htm Media Stats] ; [[:en:Audit Bureau of Circulations (UK)|Audit Bureau of Circulations (UK)]]: [https://www.abc.org.uk/verification/print-digital-events Print, Digital and Event Figures] ==TemplateData== {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "Infobox for magazines.", "params": { "italic title": { "label": "DO NOT ADD ANYTHING HERE", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "This is automatically filled by the template. Do not touch this." }, "title": { "label": "Title", "description": "Name of the magazine.", "type": "string", "required": true }, "logo": { "label": "Logo", "type": "wiki-file-name", "required": false, "suggested": true }, "logo_size": { "label": "Logo size", "description": "The size of the logo image.", "type": "number", "required": false }, "image_size": { "label": "Image size", "type": "number", "required": false }, "image_file": { "label": "Image", "type": "wiki-file-name", "required": false, "description": "An image relevant to the magazine. Usually the cover.", "suggested": true }, "image_alt": { "label": "Image alt text", "type": "content", "required": false, "description": "A description of the image's visual appearance, suitable for someone who cannot see the image.", "example": "Mostly-assembled globe of puzzle pieces, each with a letter in a different script. The caption says \"WikipediA: The Free Encyclopedia\"." }, "image_page": { "label": "Page of image?", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The desired page (for .djvu files).", "example": "7" }, "image_caption": { "label": "Image caption", "type": "content", "required": false, "aliases": [ "caption" ], "example": "The Wikipedian Issue 169, cover dated 31 November 1909", "suggested": true }, "editor_title": { "label": "Editor title", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The editor's job title.", "example": "Editor-in-Chief" }, "editor": { "label": "Editor", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The name of the editor of the magazine. Must be used in conjunction with the \"Editor title\" field.", "example": "[[:en:John Smith|John Smith]]", "suggested": true }, "editor_title2": { "label": "Editor 2's title", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The second editor's job title." }, "editor2": { "label": "Editor 2", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The name of the second editor." }, "editor_title3": { "label": "Editor 3's title", "type": "string", "required": false }, "editor3": { "label": "Editor 3", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "I think you see where this is going." }, "editor_title4": { "label": "Editor 4's title", "type": "string", "required": false }, "editor4": { "label": "Editor 4", "type": "string", "required": false }, "editor_title5": { "label": "Editor 5's title", "type": "string", "required": false }, "editor5": { "label": "Editor 5", "type": "string", "required": false }, "editor_title6": { "label": "Editor 6's title", "type": "string", "required": false }, "editor6": { "label": "Editor 6", "type": "string", "required": false }, "previous_editor": { "label": "Former editor(s)", "type": "content", "required": false, "description": "Notable preceding editor(s)." }, "staff_writer": { "label": "Staff writer(s)", "type": "content", "required": false }, "photographer": { "label": "Photographer(s)", "type": "content", "required": false }, "category": { "label": "Categories", "type": "content", "required": true, "description": "The subject group of the magazine, e.g., Sport, Nature, History. Use as many as necessary.", "example": "[[:en:Science|Science]], [[:en:Sport|Sport]], [[:en:History|History]]" }, "frequency": { "label": "Frequency", "type": "string", "required": true, "description": "Frequency of the magazine. Monthly, weekly, daily, etc." }, "format": { "label": "Format", "type": "string", "description": "Paper size.", "example": "A4" }, "circulation": { "label": "Circulation", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "Circulation figures. If circulation breakdown available, leave this field blank and see fields lower down.", "example": "50,000" }, "publisher": { "label": "Publisher", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The person that publishes the magazine. Do not put companies in this field." }, "paid_circulation": { "label": "Paid circulation", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The circulation of \"paid for\" copies of the magazine." }, "unpaid_circulation": { "label": "Unpaid circulation", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The circulation of free copies of the magazine." }, "circulation_year": { "label": "Circulation year", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The year for which the \"Total circulation\" figure is provided." }, "total_circulation": { "label": "Total circulation", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The total circulation of the magazine." }, "founder": { "label": "Founder", "type": "string", "required": false, "aliases": [ "creator" ], "description": "The person that founded the magazine. Do not put companies in this field." }, "founded": { "label": "Founded", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The date the magazine company was founded.", "example": "{{start date|1998|3|13|df=y}}", "suggested": true }, "firstdate": { "label": "First issue", "type": "string", "required": true, "description": "The date of publication of the first issue of the magazine.", "example": "{{start date|1998|3|13|df=y}}" }, "finalnumber": { "label": "Final issue number", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The edition number of the final issue.", "example": "Vol 77 No 88" }, "finaldate": { "label": "Final issue", "type": "string", "required": false, "aliases": [ "lastdate" ], "description": "The date of the final issue of the magazine.", "example": "31 April 1999" }, "company": { "label": "Company", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The company that publishes the magazine.", "suggested": true }, "country": { "label": "Country", "type": "string", "required": true, "description": "Country of origin.", "example": "United Kingdom" }, "based": { "label": "Based in", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The town/city that the magazine is based in.", "example": "[[:en:New York City|New York City]], [[:en:New York|New York]], [[:en:United States|United States]]", "suggested": true }, "language": { "label": "Language", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The language the magazine is printed in.", "example": "English", "suggested": true }, "website": { "label": "Website", "type": "url", "required": false, "description": "The official website of the magazine." }, "issn": { "label": "ISSN", "type": "string", "required": false, "aliases": [ "ISSN" ], "description": "The International Standard Serial Number of the magazine. If the magazine has both a print and electronic version with separate ISSNs, use parameters \"ISSN\" and \"eISSN\"." }, "eissn": { "label": "eISSN", "type": "string", "required": false, "aliases": [ "eISSN" ] }, "oclc": { "label": "OCLC", "type": "string", "required": false, "aliases": [ "OCLC" ], "description": "The OCLC number of the magazine (automatically linked to http://WorldCat.org)." } }, "paramOrder": [ "italic title", "title", "logo", "logo_size", "image_file", "image_size", "image_alt", "image_page", "image_caption", "editor", "editor_title", "editor2", "editor_title2", "editor3", "editor_title3", "editor4", "editor_title4", "editor5", "editor_title5", "editor6", "editor_title6", "previous_editor", "staff_writer", "photographer", "category", "frequency", "format", "circulation", "publisher", "founder", "founded", "firstdate", "finaldate", "finalnumber", "company", "country", "based", "language", "website", "issn", "eissn", "oclc", "paid_circulation", "unpaid_circulation", "circulation_year", "total_circulation" ], "format": "block" } == Microformat == {{UF-hprod}} == Tracking category == * {{clc|Pages using infobox magazine with unsupported parameters}} == See also == * {{tl|Infobox journal}} * {{TL|Infobox newspaper}} {{Organization infoboxes}} {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Magazine templates]] [[Category:Organization infobox templates|Magazine]] [[Category:Publishing infobox templates|Magazine]] [[Category:WikiProject Journalism templates]] [[Category:WikiProject Magazines templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
